title: Class 1-2, Sakamoto-kun / Bee Quiet
overview: Sakamoto is a stylish student whose cool behavior draws the attention of everyone at his high school. Three punks in his class who don't like him, Acchan, Mario, and Kenken, target him for all sorts of bullying, but it always backfires on them. So they finally decide to take care of him for real...

title: I'd Rather Protect Than Be Protected / Psychological Techniques for Romance That You Can Use Today
overview:
One day, Sakamoto sees his classmate, Kubota, being shaken down for money. He calls out to him, and Kubota begs for his help, saying he has no money left. But Sakamoto has an idea...

Who's the coolest? Sakamoto. Girls compete for him and play Kokkuri-San to find out who he likes. How will it end up?

title: Errand Boy Sakamoto / Love Hide-and-Seek
overview: A second-year delinquent, Maruyama, has been making first-years into his errand boys. Sakamoto becomes one of them, and Maruyama is more than pleased with his work. Eventually he grows bored of coming up with orders and tells Sakamoto to serve him of his own volition!

title: Is Sakamoto a Pervert? / The "Sights of the Classroom" Collection / The Summer Sakamoto Disappeared
overview: Sakamoto is always perfectly on time, draws like an angel, cooks like a master, creates his own parachute, and... disappears?

title: Softball Throw / The Charismatic Delinquent, Hayabusa-senpai / Personal Health Care
overview: Sakamoto is challenged to a fight by the second year head of delinquents, Hayabusa. Has Sakamoto met his match? Later, Sakamoto gets a cold

title: Rules for Leaving School / Love Through the Camera Lens / Cafeteria Marketing
overview: Sakamoto's charisma continues to transcend all boundaries. His antics not only charm bullies but also school children and... pale female ghosts with long black hair?!

title: Really, Is Sakamoto a Pervert? / Sera's French Revolution
overview: For Acchan's gang, the curtain guarding the over 18 video section seems impassable, until Sakamoto appears. Later, Sera wants to take Sakamoto down a peg at the sports meet.

title: A Gloomy Cultural Festival
overview: Sakamoto's class is making a display for the school festival, but when an older delinquent returns to the school, even Sakamoto may not be able to escape his game.

title: How Sakamoto-kun and I Met / The One Closest to Me, Yet Most Distant
overview: Girls from Sakamoto's class reminisce on how they met him, and Kubota comes down with a cold. but shows up to school anyway?

title: The Devil / What's Lacking
overview: Sakamoto is invited to a mixer, a social situation he knows nothing about! Then, it's Hayabusa's turn to enter a foreign situation, but he's not alone.

title: I Don't Need Warmth / Class 1-2 Memories
overview: Acchan is excited to teach Sakamoto about playing in the snow, but he comes to a realization that Fukase will use to his advantage.

title: Goodbye, Sakamoto-kun
overview: Sakamoto is giving the farewell speech at graduation when Acchan attacks him! Fukase seems to be set on never leaving school, but perhaps this scheme will be his last.
